creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text: This duplicates needless conditional compiler selection logic from OpenEXR. As I suggested in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=196712, it'd be better to use compiler:c++11-lib everywhere instead, which essentially does the same thing (noop on 10.x, recent gcc on pre-10), but is shorter, more flexible and future-proof.
